contextual.title: Post-Marketing Surveillance of Micombi Tablets Survey on the Long-term Use
contextual.text:
Summary: The survey is conducted to collect safety and effectiveness information in Hypertensive patients treated with Micombi Tablets on the long term use in daily clinical settings in Japan.
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 Hypertensive patients who have never taken Micombi Tablets. 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 None
